what_the_chronicle_proves: Governance patterns transfer across specimens with different evidence channels
PATH B evidence (HTML documents) can produce governed semantic propositions
Operator review generates genuine governance friction on document-derived claims
Evidence enrichment strengthens propositions even without code graph access
Deterministic revalidation confirms governance-driven improvement across specimen types
S2_BRIDGE → S2_GOVERNED transition demonstrates governance lifecycle is specimen-independent
Cross-specimen convergence establishes Program Intelligence as a discipline, not a one-specimen trick
Governed cognition can be composed into navigable cognitive traversal instruments
what_the_chronicle_does_not_prove: Raw intake genesis for BlueEdge (chronicle corridor is post-genesis semantic replay)
More than 2-specimen pattern maturity for candidate laws (comparison, not generalization)
That the chronicle replaces governed outputs (reports, LENS views, SQO cockpit)
